title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete UI
scenario: Verify the delete icon is displayed below the Log out button in the Account tab under General settings, consistent with the Figma design.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Account tab under General settings.
2. Scroll down to locate the Log out button.
3. Check below the Log out button for the presence of a delete icon.
4. Compare the delete icon's appearance (position, style, size) with the Figma design.
expected: The delete icon is present below the Log out button in the Account tab under General settings, matching the Figma design.
